hero.title: We design permanence. We build with precision.
hero.lead: From architecture to construction, we deliver spaces with technical rigour, contemporary language and absolute attention to detail.

manifesto.label: Manifesto
manifesto.title:
Space is not empty.
It is architectural matter.
manifesto.body: ACCSTAGE rejects disposable architecture. We work with pure geometries, disciplined proportion and materials that gain character over time.

rigor.title: Rigour
rigor.body: Every line comes from technical intent, never from fleeting visual effect.

permanence.title: Permanence
permanence.body: We design to endure for decades with spatial and material dignity.

precision.title: Precision
precision.body: Execution is held to the same demanding standard as the concept phase.

hero.label: About
hero.title: Architects of intent.
hero.lead: We do not draw to occupy space. We draw to define it with permanence, formal restraint and absolute precision.

manifesto.label: Manifesto
manifesto.title: Disciplined geometry. Material with legacy.
manifesto.body_1: ACCSTAGE operates at the boundary between architecture and spatial direction. Every project begins with a rigorous reading of place, light and proportion to achieve clear presence without formal excess.
manifesto.body_2: We approach each commission as a three-dimensional editorial composition: sequence, void, rhythm and materiality in balance. The goal is clear — timeless spaces that retain technical and aesthetic relevance for decades.

rigor.title: Rigour
rigor.description: We apply strict technical criteria at every stage, from concept to construction detail.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We select materials and systems for their ability to age with coherence and nobility.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: We build transparent relationships, aligning vision, schedule and delivery.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: Millimetric precision is the silent foundation of every space we design.

facts.office_value: R. António Luis Gomes 120, 4430-195 Vila Nova de Gaia

hero.label: Services
hero.title: Services delivered with rigour, vision and integrated execution.
hero.lead: Accstage combines architecture, construction and specialised solutions with a focus on quality, technical consistency and long-term value.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.paragraph_1: Our multidisciplinary team of designers and architects develops projects from first sketches and strategic briefing through on-site technical follow-up.
architecture.paragraph_2: Our methods unite creativity with technical rigour to deliver consistent and innovative outcomes.
architecture.paragraph_3: We have broad experience across residential projects and health, sports and commercial buildings.
architecture.paragraph_4: Close collaboration with each client is essential to achieving the intended result.

construction.title: Construction
construction.paragraph_1: With strong experience in collective and single-family housing, Accstage delivers projects in national and international markets.
construction.paragraph_2: Beyond residential buildings, we build across multiple typologies.
construction.paragraph_3: Our track record gives us the confidence required by an increasingly demanding market.
construction.paragraph_4: We offer high responsiveness to complex technical and operational requirements.
construction.paragraph_5: Supported by a highly qualified technical team, Accstage – Building for Tomorrow is a solid choice for excellence at every project stage.
construction.paragraph_6: We work so that our confidence becomes our clients’ confidence.

metal_solutions.title: Metal Solutions
metal_solutions.paragraph_1: Our metal solutions for architecture stem from a genuine passion and deep expertise in metal craft. We believe metal will play an ever greater role in construction.
metal_solutions.paragraph_2: To deliver differentiated solutions, we pursue new challenges that drive progress at every level and encourage new concepts.
metal_solutions.paragraph_3: Our skilled team develops high-demand products with innovative, consistently reliable results.
metal_solutions.paragraph_4: We combine quality, precision and engineering to remain highly competitive in global markets.

vertical_gardens.title: Vertical Gardens
vertical_gardens.paragraph_1: Environmental thinking is increasingly central to urban policy, design practice and public governance. Because we intervene directly in territory and built form, ecological concerns are integral to our work.
vertical_gardens.paragraph_2: A vertical garden, or green wall, is a landscape intervention in architecture, where façades or walls are covered with vegetation through specialised systems, significantly improving local microclimate.
vertical_gardens.paragraph_3: Beyond technical benefits such as thermal efficiency, vertical gardens bring undeniable visual refinement through natural presence.

hero.label: Contact
hero.title: Let’s discuss your next project.
hero.lead: Share your goals and context. ACCSTAGE replies with technical framing, clear next steps and professional guidance.

panel.intro_text: Official headquarters in Vila Nova de Gaia, delivering premium architecture and construction across different scales.

form.email_hint: Please enter a valid professional email.
form.project_type_hint: Select or describe the project type.
form.message_hint: Please share the essential details of your request.
form.success: Request sent. We will contact you shortly.

map.title: Visit ACCSTAGE headquarters
map.address: R. António Luis Gomes 120, 4430-195 Vila Nova de Gaia

archive.label: Project archive
archive.title: Projects
archive.lead: Archive of %d selected interventions shaped by minimalist language, technical rigour and a long-term perspective.

not_found.label: ACCSTAGE archive
not_found.title: Project not found
not_found.body: The requested project does not exist in the current archive. Browse the full project selection.

2urba.title: 2URBA
2urba.description_1: Cross-cutting project for two semi-detached homes in a development area in Guimarães, defined by modern minimalist lines and balanced material composition.
2urba.description_2: The homes are organised over three levels: ground floor with social areas and support spaces, first floor with three bedrooms, and basement garage for two vehicles per unit.
2urba.cta: Planning a residential project in this language?

ribeira_verde.title: Ribeira Verde
ribeira_verde.description_1: Ribeira Verde strengthens the relationship between construction and nature by integrating water, trees and vegetation into the building concept.
ribeira_verde.description_2: The project enhances the Ribeira de Couros corridor and helps connect the city’s green park to the historic centre.
ribeira_verde.description_3: With 33 apartments, generous areas and high-quality finishes, it delivers comfort, biodiversity and a clear ecological response in Guimarães’ housing market.
ribeira_verde.cta: Let’s discuss an urban project with positive impact.

camport.title: Camport Factory
camport.description_1: The design aligns functionality and organisational logic for a recognised footwear brand, combining concrete strength with white aluminium and controlled transparency.
camport.description_2: Light, both interior and exterior, structures the proposal. The main façade geometry derives from a core element connected to the company’s identity: the insole.
camport.cta: Looking for an architectural approach to an industrial facility?

quinta_peixoto.title: Quinta do Peixoto
quinta_peixoto.description_1: Residential development in Mascotelos with 13 plots, 78 units and extensive green areas, designed with sustainability and biodiversity as central values.
quinta_peixoto.description_2: Energy class A, thermal comfort, electric systems and solar panels reinforce a minimalist architectural language with long-term performance.
quinta_peixoto.cta: Planning a housing complex focused on sustainability?

canaima.title: Casa Canaima
canaima.description_1: In Nules, this residential development raised standards of comfort and construction quality in a city closely linked to the ceramics industry.
canaima.description_2: The gated complex includes 26 terraced single-family homes arranged in two fronts around a shared interior courtyard for security, social use and thermal comfort.
canaima.description_3: Each dwelling is organised across four levels, including private outdoor space and collective basement parking with two spaces per unit.
canaima.description_4: Completed in early 2008, the project remains highly consistent in performance and built quality.
canaima.cta: Looking to develop housing with elegance and a strong sense of community?

teixeira.title: Casa Teixeira
teixeira.description_2: The design draws on modernist values through formal clarity, raw geometries and precise dialogue between materials.
teixeira.description_3: A compact exterior volume contrasts with an open, light-filled interior articulated through patios and controlled openings.
teixeira.description_4: This strategy reinforces privacy while preserving spatial quality and daylight.
teixeira.cta: Seeking a contemporary home with privacy, light and material rigour?

lousada.title: Lousada Padel Park
lousada.description_2: Integrated into the Lousada Sports Complex, the project introduces a fast-growing sport programme into the existing infrastructure.
lousada.description_3: The concept delivers a strong yet lightweight visual presence, using level differences and planted false façades to connect architecture with nature.
lousada.description_4: The continuous dialogue between built form and vegetation defines the project’s identity, both outside and inside the pavilion.
lousada.cta: Planning a sports facility with strong architectural identity?

sort.title: Sort Clinic
sort.description_1: Occupational safety and health services building.
sort.description_2: This interior restructuring and rehabilitation project transforms a former commercial unit into an efficient clinic with elegant, dynamic lines and coherent minimal detailing.
sort.cta: Looking to transform a service space with efficiency and contemporary elegance?

m73.title: M73 Apartments
m73.description_2: Conceived for Felgueiras city centre, the project offers collective housing with high standards of design, comfort and urban presence, balancing texture, sunlight and privacy.
m73.cta: Developing collective housing with comfort, elegance and strong urban presence?

brand.name: ACCSTAGE Lda.
brand.description: Premium architecture and construction with precise direction, disciplined materiality and long-term vision.
